emails.subject: Deal # 476147
emails.body: Deal 476147 Hello, I think that deal 476147 might should have been entered as a buy resale instead of as transmission. There are not any other transmission deals in the system with this counterparty. If you would not mind looking into this and letting me know I would appreciate it. Thanks! Melissa 3-1886

emails.subject: Re: Deal # 476147
emails.body: Re: Deal 476147 I talked to Diana Scholtes last night about this deal, and she looked at it this afternoon. She says the deal is definitely not entered correctly, but because it was done for the days when we got hit with transmission cuts, she wants to look into it a little further before she changes or kills it. She said she'd reconcile it tomorrow, and we'll let you know what we've done then. Thanks for your patience, Kate Melissa Ann Murphy 12/13/2000 04:40 PM
